theorem: PRIMARY BLACK HOLE ENTROPY INVARIANT: Gate Pair Conservation
statement: ∀ (s : GateLoopState) (i : ℕ), GateInvariant s i → let tracked_pairs = GateLoopState.num_pairs_updated s; total_basis = GateContext.dim (GateLoopState.ctx s); hidden_pairs = total_basis / 2 in tracked_pairs + (total_basis / 2 - tracked_pairs) ≡ total_basis / 2
proof_strategy: Subtraction-addition inverse: a ≤ b → a + (b - a) ≡ b
